data.body: KICKOFF /rebar-implement jira-reb-977 (creation_channel provenance). Tree: epic jira-reb-977 -> 3 story children in linear depends_on chain: 6fe2 (CLI/MCP/Python attribution, no deps) -> e622 (Jira/import + legacy inference) -> 568c (SNAPSHOT durability). All 3 code-changing leaves. Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim + require_completion_verification_for_close. Epic has valid signed plan-review attestation; children have none (must review-plan each before claim). Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-creation-channel on branch impl/creation-channel-provenance from origin/main 8bb261c19. Landing method: epic plan specifies Gerrit feature branch feature/creation-channel-provenance; will confirm feature-branch-driver access, else fall back to stacked relation chain on refs/for/main (equivalent AC outcome for a linear chain). commit-msg hook present (Change-Id).
